Sidebar-listWrapper_collapsible2FvmZ40ldHxj rm-Sidebar-section"><button aria-label="Expand Download category" class="Sidebar-headingTRQyOa2pk0gh Sidebar-heading_collapsible1GOm26rptZH6 style="--icon-color:inherit;--icon-size:var(--icon-md);--icon-stroke-width:2px"></span></span></button><ul class="Sidebar-list_sidebarLayout3RaX72iQNOEI Sidebar-list3cZWQLaBf9k8 Sidebar-list_collapsible3Y5alpA9ncHt rm-Sidebar-list"><li class="Sidebar-item23D-2Kd61_k3"><a class="Sidebar-link2Dsha-r-GKh2 childless text-wrap rm-Sidebar-link" target="_self" Setup</span></span></a></li></ul></section></div><button aria-label="Hide sidebar navigation" class="Nav-toggle-collapse39KxgTH727KL" type="button"></button></nav><article class="SuperHubDoc-article3ArTrEavUTKg rm-Article rm-Guides-SuperHub"><header id="content-head"><div class="row clearfix"><div class="col-xs-9"><h1>Payment Token Request Parameters</h1></div></div></header><div class="grid-container-fluid" id="content-container"><section class="content-body grid-75 "><div class="rm-Markdown markdown-body rm-Markdown markdown-body ng-non-bindable" data-testid="RDMD" style="margin-left:31px"><style>/*! tailwindcss v4.1.17 | MIT License | https://tailwindcss.com */
@layer theme, base, components, utilities;
@layer utilities;
</style><div class="readme-tailwind"><blockquote class="callout callout_info" theme="📘"><span class="callout-icon">📘</span><h3 class="heading heading-3 header-scroll"><div class="heading-anchor anchor waypoint" id="data-attribute-reference"></div><div class="heading-text">Data Attribute Reference</div><a aria-label="Skip link to Data Attribute Reference" class="heading-anchor-icon fa fa-regular fa-anchor" href="#data-attribute-reference"></a></h3><p><strong>Data Type</strong></p><ul>
<li>A: Alphabet</li>
<li>AN: Alphanumeric</li>
<li>NT: NText</li>
<li>C: Characters</li>
<li>B: Boolean</li>
<li>D: Decimal</li>
<li>N: Numeric</li>
</ul><p><strong>Mandatory attributes</strong></p><ul>
<li>M: Mandatory</li>
<li>C: Conditional</li>
<li>O: Optional</li>
</ul></blockquote></div>
<h1 class="heading heading-1 header-scroll"><div class="heading-anchor anchor waypoint" id="api-request-specification"></div><div class="heading-text">API Request Specification</div><a aria-label="Skip link to API Request Specification" class="heading-anchor-icon fa fa-regular fa-anchor" href="#api-request-specification"></a></h1>
<div class="readme-tailwind"><p><div class="rdmd-html"><table class="relative-table wrapped" style="width: 100%">
    <colgroup>
        <col style="width: 4%" />
        <col style="width: 4%" />
        <col style="width: 4%" />
        <col style="width: 4%" />
        <col style="width: 4%" />
        <col style="width: 15%" />
        <col style="width: 5%" />
        <col style="width: 60%" />
    </colgroup>
    <thead>
        <tr>
            <th class="" colspan="5">
                <p align="center">Parameter</p>
            </th>
            <th class="">
                <p align="center">Data Type</p>
            </th>
            <th class="">
                <p align="center">Mandatory</p>
            </th>
            <th class="">
                <p align="center">Description</p>
            </th>
        </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>merchantID</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">AN 25</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">M</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>Unique merchant ID that is registered with 2C2P</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>invoiceNo</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">AN 50</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">M</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>Unique merchant order number.<br />Example: 00000000010000091203</p>
                <br />
                <p><strong>Pass through invoice no restriction :</strong></p>
                <p>
                    *Limited to length of 12 numerals when requesting for APM payment for
                    Myanmar.
                </p>
                <p>
                    *Limited to length of 20 alphanumeric when requesting for QR Payment.
                </p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>idempotencyID</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">C 100</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>
                    Unique value generated by the merchant that is used to recognize
                    subsequent retries of the same request.
                </p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>description</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">C 250</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">M</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>
                    Product description. HTML Encode is required if it contains special
                    characters.

                </p>
                <p>
                    Avoid using unnecessary special characters, as they may cause issues with parsing or rendering on
                    the
                    receiving end.
                </p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>amount</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">D (12,5)</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">M</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
              <p>Example: 2500.90000</p>
							<p>Decimal point supported by each currency, refer to
                    <a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217">ISO 4217</a>
              </p>
              <p>For Currency <b>IDR</b>, supported 0 decimal point 
   								(which is different from ISO 4217)</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>currencyCode</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">A 3</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">M</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>
                    Transaction currency code in 3 alphabetical values as specified in ISO
                    4217.
                </p>
                <p>
                    If the value is empty, the system<br />will use the merchant's base
                    currency
                </p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>paymentChannel</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">Array AN 1-6</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>
                    If this value is empty, all channels can be used.
                </p>
                <p>
                    Value must be in string array if multiple payment channels are
                    requested.
                </p>
                <p>
                    Payment Token requests for 123 Channels, please refer to Group Code column instead.
                </p>
                <p>Example : ["CC", "IPP", "APM", "QR"]</p>
                <p>
                    Refer to
                    <a href="reference-payment-channels">Payment Channel List.</a>
                </p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>agentChannel</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">Array AN 1-6</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>
                    Value must be in string array.
                </p>
                <p>
                    Payment Token requests for 123 Channels, please refer to Agent Channel Code column instead.
                </p>
                <p>Example : ["WEBPAY", "ATM", "OVERTHECOUNTER"]</p>
                <p>
                    Refer to
                    <a href="reference-payment-channels">Agent Channel Code</a>
                </p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>request3DS</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">A1</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>Specify enable/disable 3ds authentication</p>
                <ul>
                    <li>Y &ndash; Enable 3ds (default)</li>
                    <li>F &ndash; Force 3ds</li>
                    <li>N &ndash; Disable 3ds</li>
                </ul>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>tokenize</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">B</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>
                    Specify whether display store card checkbox is in payment page. Used
                    to enable tokenization and card token will be returned when payment is
                    approved.
                </p>
                <p>Used by SDK UI</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>customerToken</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">Array<br />C 255</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>
                    To register wallet tokens for payment. When a merchant requests to do
                    Payment API later, only the registered wallet tokens are retrieved
                </p>
                <p>
                    Value must be in string array if multiple wallet tokens are requested.
                </p>
                <p>Example : ["00001", "00002"]</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">customerTokenOnly</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">B</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">
                <p>
                    Specify whether to allow customer token only. This is only applicable for
                    customer payment page.
                </p>
                <p>
                    If merchant set to customer token only, new wallet options are not allowed
                    in the payment page.
                </p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>tokenizeOnly</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">B</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>Specify whether to require tokenization with authorization</p>
                <p>
                    true - Tokenization without authorization<br />false - Tokenization
                    with authorization (Default)
                </p>
                <p>Used by SDK UI</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>storeCredentials</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">A 1</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>Store Credential (depend on acquiring bank whether support COF)</p>
                <p>
                    F &ndash; First time payment<br />S &ndash; Subsequent payment<br />N
                    &ndash; Not using
                </p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>externalToken</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">C Max</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>External token id used for specific payment channel</p>
                <p>
                    Such as Alipay offline payment
                </p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>interestType</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">A 1</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>Installment interest type</p>
                <p>
                    A &ndash; All available options (Default)<br />C &ndash; Customer Pay
                    Interest Option ONLY<br />M &ndash; Merchant Pay Interest Option ONLY
                </p>
            </td>
      </tr>
<tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>externalToken</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">C Max</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>External token id used for specific payment channel</p>
                <p>
                    Such as Alipay offline payment
                </p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>installmentPeriodFilter</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">Array</p>
                <p align="center">N 2</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>
                    Select Installment Payment Plan Period that the merchant wants to
                    offer.
                </p>
                <p>
                    Example:<br />Available periods are 3,6,12,24 months, but if the
                    merchant wants to restrict to 3 &amp; 6 months only, enter the value
                    as [3,6]
                </p>
                <p>Value must be in Integer</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>installmentBankFilter</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">Array</p>
                <p align="center">N 2</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>
                    Select Installment Banks that the merchant wants to
                    offer.
                </p>
                <p>
                    Example:<br />Available banks are HSBC, Citibank, but if the
                    merchant wants to restrict to Citibank only, enter the value
                    as ["Citibank"]
                </p>
                <p>Value must be in String</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>productCode</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">AN 50</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>Installment product code</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>recurring</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">B</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>true - enable recurring<br />false - disable recurring (Default)</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>invoicePrefix</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">AN 15</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">C</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>
                    Recurring transaction will add 5 additional digit behind invoicePrefix
                    as invoice number.
                </p>
                <p>mandatory if recurring is set to true</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>recurringAmount</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">D (12,5)</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>
                    Recurring charge amount. If this value is not set, system will use
                    transaction amount
                </p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>allowAccumulate</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">B</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">C</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>Allow accumulation of failed Recurring transaction amounts</p>
                <p>true - Allow<br />false - Do not allow</p>
                <p>mandatory if recurring is set to true</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>maxAccumulateAmount</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">D (12,5)</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">C</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>Maximum recurring accumulated amount.</p>
                <p>
                    If the maximum accumulated amount is exceeded, recurring feature will
                    be terminated.
                </p>
                <p>mandatory if recurring is set to true</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>recurringInterval</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">N 3</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">C</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>Recurring interval in days, system will charge every x days</p>
                <p>
                    Example:<br />set to 30 days, payment was made on 1 May 2020,<br />System
                    will charge next cycle on 1 June 2020 and so on.
                </p>
                <p>mandatory if recurring is set to true</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>recurringCount</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">N 5</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">C</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>
                    Specify the number of cycles of recurring payment that the system will
                    charge.
                </p>
                <p>mandatory if recurring is set to true</p>
                <p>Set this to '0' to charge indefinitely until terminated manually.</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>chargeNextDate</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">N 8</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>The next date of recurring payment</p>
                <p>format: ddMMyyyy</p>
                <p>Only required if RPP with recurringInterval is set.</p>
                <p>
                    If RPP is using chargeOnDate then chargeNextDate is optional. If
                    chargeNextDate is not set, chargeOnDate Date and Month will be used.
                </p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>chargeOnDate</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">N 4</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">C</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>Indicate Recurring payment charge on specific day of every month.</p>
                <p>Date format is ddMM.</p>
                <p>
                    dd represents which day of every month that the recurring payment is
                    charged.
                </p>
                <p>MM is only used if field chargeNextDate is not set.</p>
                <p>If this value is set, recurringInterval will not be valid.</p>
                <p>mandatory if recurring is set to true</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>paymentExpiry</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">C 19</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>
                    Duration of time which the customer is allowed to complete payment.
                    Payment completed after the expiry date/time will be rejected.
                </p>
                <p>Date Format : yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss</p>
                <p>Default value is 20 minutes</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>promotionCode</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">AN 20</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>Promotion code for the payment.</p>
                <p>&nbsp;</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>paymentRouteID</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">C 255</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>Payment routing rules based on custom configuration</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>fxProviderCode</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">AN 20</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>Forex provided code used to enable multiple currency payments</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>fxRateId</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">C 50</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>Forex rate id</p>
                <p>Refer to <a href="api-exchange-rate">Exchange Rate API</a>.</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>originalAmount</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">D 12,5</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>original currency amount</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>immediatePayment</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">B</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>To trigger payment immediately</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>iframeMode</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">B</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>To determine this payment is in iframe mode</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>userDefined1</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">C 150</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>For merchant to submit merchant's specific data.</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>userDefined2</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">C 150</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>For merchant to submit merchant's specific data.</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>userDefined3</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">C 150</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>For merchant to submit merchant's specific data.</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>userDefined4</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">C 150</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>For merchant to submit merchant's specific data.</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>userDefined5</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">C 150</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>For merchant to submit merchant's specific data.</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>statementDescriptor</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">AN 20</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>Dynamic statement description</p>
                <ul>
                    <li><b>Contains between 5 and 20 characters, inclusive.</b></li>
                    <li>
                        <b>Ensure that Statment Descriptor does not contain any of the following special characters: <>
                                \ ' "
                                *</b>
                    </li>
                </ul>
                <p><i>* Feature availibity subject to acquirer bank</i></p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>protocolVersion</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">AN 10</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>3DsProtocol version</p>
                <p>Default value is "2.1.0"</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>eci</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">N 2</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">C</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>
                    Required if parameter protocolVersion or cavv or dsTransactionId is
                    pass in.
                </p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>cavv</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">AN 40</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">C</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>
                    Required if parameter protocolVersion or cavv or dsTransactionId is
                    pass in.
                </p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>dsTransactionId</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">C 36</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>Required if parameter protocolVersion or eci or cavv is pass in.</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>externalSubMerchantID</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">AN 50</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>External Sub Merchant ID</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>subMerchants</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">-</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>Sub merchant list</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">
                <p>&nbsp;</p>
            </td>
            <td class="" colspan="4">
                <p>merchantID</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">AN 25</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">M</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>Unique sub merchant ID that is registered with 2C2P</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">
                <p>&nbsp;</p>
            </td>
            <td class="" colspan="4">
                <p>invoiceNo</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">AN 20</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">M</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>Unique merchant order number.<br />Example: 00000000010000091203</p>
                <p>
                    *Limited to 12 numerals when requesting for APM payment for Myanmar.
                </p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">
                <p>&nbsp;</p>
            </td>
            <td class="" colspan="4">
                <p>amount</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">D (12,5)</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">M</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>Example: 000000002500.90000</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">
                <p>&nbsp;</p>
            </td>
            <td class="" colspan="4">
                <p>description</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">C 255</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">M</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>
                    Product description. HTML Encode is required if it contains special
                    characters.
                </p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="4">loyaltyPoints</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">-</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">List of loyalty points</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">providerID</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">AN 20</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">Loyalty point provider id</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">externalMerchantId</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">AN 50</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C</td>
            <td class="">External mercahnt id</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">redeemAmount</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">D 12,5</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">Amount</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">rewards</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">-</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">List of rewards</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="2">quantity</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">N</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">Rewards quantity</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">
                <p>&nbsp;</p>
            </td>
            <td class="" colspan="4">
                <p>originalAmount</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">D (12,5)</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>Example: 000000002500.90000</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>paymentItems</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">-</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>Payment Items list</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">
                <p>&nbsp;</p>
            </td>
            <td class="" colspan="4">
                <p>code</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">C 25</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>Example: MSK001</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">
                <p>&nbsp;</p>
            </td>
            <td class="" colspan="4">
                <p>name</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">C 50</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>Example: "Green Mask"</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">
                <p>&nbsp;</p>
            </td>
            <td class="" colspan="4">
                <p>quantity</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">N 4</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>Example: 1000</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">
                <p>&nbsp;</p>
            </td>
            <td class="" colspan="4">
                <p>price</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">D (12,2)</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>Example: 7.00</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>locale</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">C 10</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>Specify payment page and API response localization</p>
                <p>
                    Refer to <a href="api-initialization">Initialization API</a> for the
                    language code list.
                </p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>frontendReturnUrl</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">NT</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>
                    Specify the return url to be redirected to merchant after payment is
                    completed via 2C2P.
                </p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>backendReturnUrl</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">NT</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>
                    Specify backend url to be notified after payment is completed via
                    2C2P.
                </p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>schemeReturnUrl</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">C 512</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>
                    If client is mobile phone, merchant may submit the return
                    schemeReturnUrl
                </p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>appBundleID</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">C 255</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">C</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>Bundle identifier for the app. This parameter is required when "schemeReturnUrl" is used.</p>
                <p>Do include this when GooglePay or ApplePay is enabled on App WebView</p>
                <p>Example : com.sample.merchant.app</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>nonceStr</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">C 32</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>Nonce random string</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>uiParams</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">-</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>Extra information parameters</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">
                <p>&nbsp;</p>
            </td>
            <td class="" colspan="4">
                <p>userInfo</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">-</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>Pre-fill User information by merchant</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">
                <p>&nbsp;</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>&nbsp;</p>
            </td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">name</td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">C 50</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>User name</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">
                <p>&nbsp;</p>
            </td>

            <td class="" colspan="3">departureDateTime</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 19</td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">M</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Airline departure date time<br>Departure time in local time yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">
                <p>&nbsp;</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>&nbsp;</p>
            </td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">arrivalDateTime</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 19</td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">M</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Airline arrival date time<br>Arrival time in local time yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">
                <p>&nbsp;</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>&nbsp;</p>
            </td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">serviceClass</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 1</td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">M</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Airline service class</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">
                <p>&nbsp;</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>&nbsp;</p>
            </td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">stopOver</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">B</td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">M</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                &nbsp;Airline indicate if stop allow or not<br>
                <ul>
                    <li>false : stopover is not restricted</li>
                    <li>true : stopover is restricted</li>
                </ul>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">
                <p>&nbsp;</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>&nbsp;</p>
            </td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">fareBasisCode</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 6</td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">M</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Airline fare basis code</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">
                <p>&nbsp;</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>&nbsp;</p>
            </td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">endorcementOrRestriction</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 12</td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">M</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                &nbsp;Airline restriction applied on ticket.<br>
                <ul>
                    <li>RESTRICTED</li>
                    <li>NORESTRICED</li>
                    <li>ENDORSED</li>
                    <li>NOT REFUNDABLE</li>
                    <li>NOT ENDORSABLE</li>
                    <li>NOT REROUTEABLE</li>
                    <li>REFUNDABLE ONLY TO</li>
                    <li>RESERVATION REQUESTS/WAITLISTED FLIGHTS</li>
                    <li>FARE SUBJECT TO GOVERNMENT APPROVAL</li>
                    <li>VALIDITY OR TRAVEL RESTRICTIONS</li>
                    <li>CERTIFICATE NUMBERS (IF AIRLINE ADVISES)</li>
                </ul>
            </td>
        <tr>
            <td class="">
                <p>&nbsp;</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>&nbsp;</p>
            </td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">fare</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">D (12,5)</td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Airline fare for the leg in payment currency</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">
                <p>&nbsp;</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>&nbsp;</p>
            </td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">fee</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">D (12,5)</td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Airline fee for the leg in payment currency</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">
                <p>&nbsp;</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>&nbsp;</p>
            </td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">tax</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">D (12,5)</td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Airline tax for the leg in payment currency</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">
                <p>&nbsp;</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>&nbsp;</p>
            </td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">departureTaxCurrencyCode</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">A 3</td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Airline departure tax currency for leg<br>Currency code in 3 alphabet value as specified
                in
                ISO 4217.</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">
                <p>&nbsp;</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>&nbsp;</p>
            </td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">departureTaxAmount</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">D (12,5)</td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Airline departure tax amount for leg</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">
                <p>3DSecure2Params</p>
            </td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">-</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;3DS 2 Parameters Objects</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="4">
                <p>payer</p>
            </td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">-</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Payer information</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">
                <p>accountCreateDate</p>
            </td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 8</td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Format: YYYYMMDD</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">accountAgeIndicator</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 2</td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                &nbsp;Account Age Indicator
                <p>
                    &bull; 01 = No account (guest check-out)<br />&bull; 02 = Created
                    during this transaction<br />&bull; 03 = Less than 30 days<br />&bull;
                    04 = 30-60 days<br />&bull; 05 = More than 60 days
                </p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">accountChangeDate</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 8</td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Format: YYYYMMDD</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">accountChangeIndicator</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 2</td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                &nbsp;Account Change Indicator
                <p>
                    &bull; 01 = Changed during this transaction<br />&bull; 02 = Less than
                    30 days<br />&bull; 03 = 30-60 days<br />&bull; 04 = More than 60 days
                </p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">accountPasswordChangeDate</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 8</td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Format: YYYYMMDD</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">accountPasswordChangeIndicator</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 2</td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                &nbsp;Account Password Change Indicator
                <p>
                    &bull; 01 = No change<br />&bull; 02 = Changed during this
                    transaction<br />&bull; 03 = Less than 30 days<br />&bull; 04 = 30-60
                    days<br />&bull; 05 = More than 60 days
                </p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">paymentAccountCreateDate</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 8</td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Format: YYYYMMDD</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">paymentAccountAgeIndicator</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 2</td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                &nbsp;Payment Account Age Indicator
                <p>
                    &bull; 01 = No account (guest check-out)<br />&bull; 02 = During this
                    transaction<br />&bull; 03 = Less than 30 days<br />&bull; 04 = 30-60
                    days<br />&bull; 05 = More than 60 days
                </p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">suspiciousAccountActivity</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 2</td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                &nbsp;Suspicious Account Activity
                <p>
                    &bull; 01 = No suspicious activity has been observed<br />&bull; 02 =
                    Suspicious activity has been observed
                </p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">purchaseCountLast6Months</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 4</td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                &nbsp;Number of purchases with this cardholder account during the
                previous six months.
                <p>maximum is 9999.</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">transactionCountLast24Hours</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 3</td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                Number of transactions (successful and abandoned) for this cardholder
                account with the 3DS Requestor across all payment accounts in the
                previous 24 hours.
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">transactionCountLastYear</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 3</td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                Number of transactions (successful and abandoned) for this cardholder
                account with the 3DS Requestor across all payment accounts in the
                previous year.
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">provisionAttemptCountLast24Hours</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 3</td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">Number of Add Card attempts in the last 24 hours.</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">shippingAddressCreateDate</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 8</td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                Date when the shipping address used for this transaction was first used
                with the 3DS Requestor.
                <p>Format: YYYYMMDD</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">shippingAddressAgeIndicator</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 2</td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                Indicates when the shipping address used for this transaction was first
                used with the 3DS Requestor.
                <p>
                    Values accepted:<br />&bull; 01 = This transaction<br />&bull; 02 =
                    Less than 30 days<br />&bull; 03 = 30-60 days<br />&bull; 04 = More
                    than 60 days
                </p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">shippingNameIndicator</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 2</td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                Ship Name Indicator
                <p>
                    &bull; 01 = Account Name identical to shipping Name<br />&bull; 02 =
                    Account Name different than shipping Name
                </p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">contact</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">-</td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Contact Information</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="2">home</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">-</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;For Home Contact</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">countryCode</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">A 2</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>

        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">subscriberNo</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 15</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Home phone subscriber number.</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="2">mobile</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">-</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;For Mobile&nbsp;Contact</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">countryCode</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">A 2</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>

        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">subscriberNo</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 15</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
