        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="2">work</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">-</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;For Work&nbsp;Contact</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">countryCode</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">A 2</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Workphone country code.</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">subscriberNo</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 15</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Work phone subscriber number.</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="4">order</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">-</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Merchant Risk Info&nbsp;</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">deliveryEmailAddress</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 254</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Email address</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">deliveryTimeframe</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 2</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">
                &nbsp;deliveryTimeFrame
                <p>
                    &bull; 01 = Electronic Delivery<br />&bull; 02 = Same day shipping<br />&bull;
                    03 = Overnight shipping<br />&bull; 04 = Two-day or more shipping
                </p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">giftCardAmount</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 15</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">
                For prepaid or gift card purchase, the purchase amount total of prepaid
                or gift card(s) in major units (for example, USD 123.45 is 123).
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">giftCardCount</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 2</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">
                giftCardCount
                <p>valid values 00-99</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">giftCardCurrencyCode</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">A 3</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">
                giftCardCurrency
                <p>Currency code in 3 alphabetical values as specified in ISO 4217.</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">preOrderDate</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 8</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Format: YYYYMMDD</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">preOrderPurchaseIndicator</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 2</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">
                &nbsp;Preorder Purchase Indicator
                <p>
                    &bull; 01 = Merchandise available<br />&bull; 02 = Future availability
                </p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">reorderItemsIndicator</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 2</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">
                Reorder Items Indicator
                <p>&bull; 01 = First time ordered<br />&bull; 02 = Reordered</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">shippingIndicator</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 2</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">
                &nbsp;Shipping Indicator
                <p>
                    &bull; 01 = Ship to cardholder&rsquo;s billing address<br />&bull; 02
                    = Ship to another verified address on file with merchant<br />&bull;
                    03 = Ship to address that is different than the cardholder&rsquo;s
                    billing address<br />&bull; 04 = &ldquo;Ship to Store&rdquo; / Pick-up
                    at local store (Store address shall be populated in shipping address
                    fields)<br />&bull; 05 = Digital goods (includes online services,
                    electronic gift cards and redemption codes)<br />&bull; 06 = Travel
                    and Event tickets, not shipped<br />&bull; 07 = Other (for example,
                    gaming, digital services not shipped, emedia subscriptions, etc.)
                </p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="4">deviceChannel</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">-</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">fixed - BRW</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="4">browserInfo</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">-</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">Browser Info, if not available submit null object</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">&nbsp;browserAcceptHeader</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 2048</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">M</td>
            <td class="">
                Exact content of the&nbsp;HTTP accept headers from
                the&nbsp;Cardholder&rsquo;s browser
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">&nbsp;browserIP</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 45</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">M</td>
            <td class="">
                IP address of the&nbsp;browser as returned by&nbsp;the HTTP headers
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">&nbsp;browserJavaEnabled</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">B</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">M</td>
            <td class="">
                Boolean that represents&nbsp;the ability of the&nbsp;cardholder browser
                to&nbsp;execute Java.
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">&nbsp;browserLanguage</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 8</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">M</td>
            <td class="">
                Value representing the&nbsp;browser language as&nbsp;defined in IETF
                BCP47
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">&nbsp;browserColorDepth</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 2</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">M</td>
            <td class="">
                Value representing the&nbsp;bit depth of the colour&nbsp;palette for
                displaying&nbsp;images, in bits per pixel.<br />Values accepted:<br />&bull;
                1 = 1 bit<br />&bull; 4 = 4 bits<br />&bull; 8 = 8 bits<br />&bull; 15 =
                15 bits<br />&bull; 16 = 16 bits<br />&bull; 24 = 24 bits<br />&bull; 32
                = 32 bits<br />&bull; 48 = 48 bits
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">&nbsp;browserScreenHeight</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 6</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">M</td>
            <td class="">
                Total height of the&nbsp;Cardholder&rsquo;s screen in&nbsp;pixels.
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">&nbsp;browserScreenWidth</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 6</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">M</td>
            <td class="">
                Total width of the&nbsp;Cardholder&rsquo;s screen in&nbsp;pixels.
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">&nbsp;browserTZ</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 5</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">M</td>
            <td class="">
                Time difference between&nbsp;UTC time and the&nbsp;Cardholder
                browser&nbsp;local time, in minutes.
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">browserUserAgent</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 2048</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">M</td>
            <td class="">
                Exact content of the&nbsp;HTTP user-agent&nbsp;header from Cardholder's
                browser
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">browserJavaScriptEnabled</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">B</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">M</td>
            <td class="">
                Boolean that represents&nbsp;the ability of the&nbsp;cardholder browser
                to&nbsp;execute JavaScript.
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">loyaltyPoints</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">-</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">List of loyalty points</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="4">providerID</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">AN 20</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">Loyalty points provider id</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="4">accountNo</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">AN 255</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">Account no</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="4">externalMerchantID</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">AN 50</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C</td>
            <td class="">External Loyalty Merchant ID</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="4">redeemAmount</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">D 12,5</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">Amount</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="4">rewards</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">Array</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">List of rewards</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">quantity</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">N</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">Rewards quantity</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">&nbsp;allowCustomerNote</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">B</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">To allow customer to display their own notes
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">&nbsp;userAgent</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 2048</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">
                &nbsp;Exact content of the&nbsp;HTTP user-agent&nbsp;header of Payer's
                browser
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">transactionMode</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">AN 20</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">
                Allow manual settle merchant to be able to select transaction mode
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">childMerchantID</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">AN 25</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C</td>
            <td class="">
                Unique merchant ID that is registered with 2C2P, must be SUB Account of
                merchantID&nbsp;
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">transactionInitiator</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 1</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">
                <p>&bull; C = Customer (Default)</p>
                <p>&bull; M = Merchant&nbsp;</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">browserDetails</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">-</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">Browser Details</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="4">Device Type</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">AN 255</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">Device Type</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="4">Name</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">AN 255</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">Name of Browser</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="4">OS</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">AN 255</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">Operating System of Browser</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="4">Version</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">AN 255</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">Version of Browser</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">clientIP</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">AN 45</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">Client IP Address<br><span>If empty, extract from HTTP request header</span></td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">clientAppID</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">AN 45</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">Client App ID<br><span>Used in Mobile SDK</span></td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">scaExemptionIndicator</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 255</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">
                <br />&bull;authentication_outage - when payer authentication is not
                available <br />&bull; delegated_authentication - when the
                authentication is performed another party <br />&bull; low_value - for
                low value transaction <br />&bull; low_risk - for low risk transaction
                <br />&bull; secure_corporate_payment - when payment is B2B transaction
                <br />&bull; trusted_merchant - when the merchant is trusted by the
                payer <br />&bull; recurring_payment - for recurring payment
                <br />&bull; out_of_sca_scope - for MIT transaction
                (transactionInitiator = 'M'), it is out of scope <br />&bull;
                transaction_risk_assessment - for transactional risk analysis is already
                performed <br />&bull; other - other reasons (if applicable)
                <br />&bull; none - (default) sca exemption is not applied
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">previousPaymentID</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">C 255</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">Required if transactionInitiator = 'M'</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">allow3DSUpgrade</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">A 1</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">
                <p>
                    Only applicable for those using 2C2P's authentication and with the
                    request of "request3DS = Y"
                </p>
                <p>
                    &bull; Y &ndash; allow upgrade to use 3DS if sca exemption didnt go
                    through and soft decline happened
                </p>
                <p>&bull; N - does not allow auto upgrade</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">requestReauthentication</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">B</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">Allow merchant to request re-authentication</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">defaultSettlementCurrencyMerchantID</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">AN 50</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">set default settlement curreny merchant ID</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">settlementCurrencyMerchantID</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">AN 50</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">set settlement curreny merchant ID</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">newRedisCacheOptimizationSwitchTag</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">B</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center">O</td>
            <td class="">use redis cache</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="" colspan="5">accountFunding</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">-</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">O</td>
            <td class="">Mandatory element if your business code required</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">
                <p>&nbsp;</p>
            </td>
            <td class="" colspan="4">senderIsRecipient</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">
                <p align="center">Boolean</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p align="center">O</p>
            </td>
            <td class="">
                <p>- True</p>
                <p>- False</p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="4">
                <pre
                    data-bidi-marker="true"><span style="font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="white-space: normal;">senderType</span></span></pre>
            </td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;Enum</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;O</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Supported Sender type<ul>
                    <li>PERSON</li>
                </ul>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="4">
                <pre
                    data-bidi-marker="true"><span style="font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="white-space: normal;">purpose</span></span></pre>
            </td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;Enum</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;O</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Supported purpose code <p>Refer to <a
                        href="reference-codes-account-funding-purpose-code">Account Funding Purpose Code</a></p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="4">sender</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp; -&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;-</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Sender Information</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">identificationType</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;Enum</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Recipient&rsquo;s account type Identifier&nbsp; <p>Refer to <a
                        href="reference-codes-account-funding-identification-type">Account Funding Identification
                        Type</a></p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">identificationValue</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;AN 50</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;O</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Recipient&rsquo;s Identification ID</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">identificationCountry</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;A 2</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Sender's Identification country&nbsp;- A2 format</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="4">recipient</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;-</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;-</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;
                <pre
                    data-bidi-marker="true"><span style="font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="white-space: normal;">Recipient Information</span></span></pre>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">
                <pre
                    data-bidi-marker="true"><span style="font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="white-space: normal;">firstName</span></span></pre>
            </td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;AN 50</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;O</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Recipient's First name</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">middleName</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;AN 50</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;O</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Recipient's Middle Name</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">lastName</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;AN 50</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;O</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Recipient's Last Name&nbsp;</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">identificationType</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;Enum</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;O</td>
            <td class=""> &nbsp;Recipient&rsquo;s account type Identifier&nbsp; <p>Refer to <a
                        href="reference-codes-account-funding-identification-type">Account Funding Identification
                        Type</a></p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">identificationValue</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;AN 50</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;O</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Recipient&rsquo;s Identification ID</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">identificationCountry</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;A 2</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;O</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Sender's Identification country&nbsp;- A2 format</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">accountIdentifierType</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;Enum</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;O</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Recipient&rsquo;s Payment account identifier Type <p>Refer to <a
                        href="reference-codes-account-funding-account-identifier-type">Account Funding Account
                        Identifier Type</a></p>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">accountIdentifier</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;AN 34</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;O</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Recipient&rsquo;s Payment account identifier</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">accountFundingMethod</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">Enum&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;O</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;If the recipient&nbsp;accountIdentifierType&nbsp;is&nbsp;CARDNO, the&nbsp;funding method
                of the card is required.&nbsp;<ul>
                    <li>DEBIT</li>
                    <li>CREDIT</li>
                    <li>CHARGE</li>
                    <li>UNKNOWN</li>
                </ul>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="3">address</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;-</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;-</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Address object</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="2">address1</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;AN 50</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;O</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Provide Unit in Address 1</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="2">address2</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;AN 50</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;O</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Provide Street in Address 2</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="2">address3</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;AN 50</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;O</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Provide Building number in Address 3</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="2">address4</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;AN 50</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;O</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Provide StreetName in Address 4</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="2">city</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;AN 50</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;O</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Provide City</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>

            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="2">state</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;AN 50</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;O</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Provide State</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="2">postalCode</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;AN 10</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;O</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;Provide Postal Code</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="">&nbsp;</td>
            <td class="" colspan="2">countryCode</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;A 2</td>
            <td class="" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;O</td>
            <td class="">Recipient's Address Country - A2 format</td>
        </tr>
    </tbody>
</table></div></p></div>
<br/>
<h1 class="heading heading-1 header-scroll"><div class="heading-anchor anchor waypoint" id="sample-request-data"></div><div class="heading-text">Sample Request Data</div><a aria-label="Skip link to Sample Request Data" class="heading-anchor-icon fa fa-regular fa-anchor" href="#sample-request-data"></a></h1>
<div class="CodeTabs CodeTabs_initial theme-undefined"><div class="CodeTabs-toolbar"><button type="button" value="json">JSON</button></div><div class="CodeTabs-inner"><pre><code class="rdmd-code lang- theme-undefined" data-lang="">{
    &quot;merchantID&quot;: &quot;4584580000&quot;,
    &quot;invoiceNo&quot;: &quot;ExtRisTestYM002&quot;,
    &quot;description&quot;: &quot;V4 Test&quot;,
    &quot;amount&quot;: &quot;100&quot;,
    &quot;currencyCode&quot;: &quot;MYR&quot;,
    &quot;externalToken&quot;: &quot;&quot;,
    &quot;recurring&quot;: false,
    &quot;invoicePrefix&quot;: &quot;&quot;,
    &quot;recurringAmount&quot;: &quot;10&quot;,
    &quot;allowAccumulate&quot;: false,
    &quot;maxAccumulateAmount&quot;: &quot;10&quot;,
    &quot;recurringInterval&quot;: &quot;1&quot;,
    &quot;recurringCount&quot;: &quot;1&quot;,
    &quot;locale&quot;: &quot;en&quot;,
    &quot;frontendReturnUrl&quot;: &quot;https://2c2p.com&quot;,
    &quot;backendReturnUrl&quot;: &quot;https://2c2p.com&quot;,
    &quot;nonceStr&quot;: &quot;12345645321&quot;,
    &quot;fxProviderCode&quot;: &quot;SCB&quot;,
    &quot;immediatePayment&quot;: true,
    &quot;iframeMode&quot;: false,
    &quot;customerAddress&quot;: {
        &quot;billing&quot;: {
            &quot;address1&quot;: &quot;35&quot;,
            &quot;address2&quot;: &quot;Rajawongse Rd&quot;,
            &quot;address3&quot;: &quot;Jakrawad, Sampantawongse&quot;,
            &quot;city&quot;: &quot;Sampantawongse&quot;,
            &quot;state&quot;: &quot;Bangkok&quot;,
            &quot;postalCode&quot;: &quot;10100&quot;,
            &quot;countryCode&quot;: &quot;TH&quot;
        },
        &quot;shipping&quot;: {
            &quot;address1&quot;: &quot;35&quot;,
            &quot;address2&quot;: &quot;Rajawongse Rd&quot;,
            &quot;city&quot;: &quot;Sampantawongse&quot;,
            &quot;state&quot;: &quot;Bangkok&quot;,
            &quot;postalCode&quot;: &quot;10100&quot;,
            &quot;countryCode&quot;: &quot;TH&quot;
        }
    },
    &quot;3DSecure2Params&quot;: {
        &quot;browserInfo&quot;: {
            &quot;browserAcceptHeader&quot;: &quot;application/x-www-form-urlencoded&quot;,
            &quot;browserIp&quot;: &quot;172.100.1.1&quot;,
            &quot;browserLanguage&quot;: &quot;en-US&quot;,
            &quot;browserColorDepth&quot;: &quot;1&quot;,
            &quot;browserScreenHeight&quot;: &quot;720&quot;,
            &quot;browserScreenWidth&quot;: &quot;1080&quot;,
            &quot;browserTz&quot;: &quot;-480&quot;,
            &quot;browserUserAgent&quot;: &quot;Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/79.0.3945.130 Safari/537.36 2C2P/20200128 (Backend client)&quot;,
            &quot;browserJavaScriptEnabled&quot;: true
        }
    },
    &quot;transactionMode&quot;: &quot;PREAUTH&quot;,
    &quot;transactionInitiator&quot;: &quot;C&quot;,
    &quot;childMerchantID&quot;: &quot;&quot;,
    &quot;scaExemptionIndicator&quot;: &quot;none&quot;,
    &quot;previousPaymentID&quot;: &quot;&quot;,
    &quot;allow3DSUpgrade&quot;: &quot;&quot;,
    &quot;externalSubMerchantID&quot;: &quot;&quot;,
    &quot;accountFunding&quot;: {
        &quot;sender&quot;: {
            &quot;identificationType&quot;: &quot;DATEOFBIRTH&quot;,
            &quot;identification&quot;: &quot;1945-01-31&quot;
        },
        &quot;recipient&quot;: {
            &quot;firstName&quot;: &quot;Terrance&quot;,
            &quot;lastName&quot;: &quot;T&quot;,
            &quot;accountIdentifierType&quot;: &quot;WALLETID_STORED&quot;,
            &quot;accountIdentifier&quot;: &quot;20937529375039475309459345&quot;,
            &quot;address&quot;: {
                &quot;address1&quot;: &quot;Unit 123&quot;,
                &quot;address2&quot;: &quot;Bangsar south&quot;,
                &quot;address3&quot;: &quot;Vetical business suite&quot;,
                &quot;address4&quot;: &quot;Jalan Kerinchi&quot;,
                &quot;city&quot;: &quot;Kuala Lumpur&quot;,
                &quot;state&quot;: &quot;14&quot;,
                &quot;postalCode&quot;: &quot;54000&quot;,
                &quot;countryCode&quot;: &quot;MY&quot;
            }
        },
        &quot;senderIsRecipient&quot;: true,
        &quot;senderType&quot;: &quot;PERSON&quot;,
        &quot;purpose&quot;: &quot;ISMTUP&quot;
    }
}</code></pre></div></div></div><div align="center" class="Flex Flex_row " justify="between" style="--flex-gap:var(--md)"><div class="UpdatedAt"><p class="DateLine "><i class="icon class=\"relative-table wrapped\" style=\"width: 100%\">\n    \u003ccolgroup>\n        \u003ccol style=\"width: 4%\" />\n        \u003ccol style=\"width: 4%\" />\n        \u003ccol style=\"width: 4%\" />\n        \u003ccol style=\"width: 4%\" />\n        \u003ccol style=\"width: 4%\" />\n        \u003ccol style=\"width: 15%\" />\n        \u003ccol style=\"width: 5%\" />\n        \u003ccol style=\"width: 60%\" />\n    \u003c/colgroup>\n    \u003cthead>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003cth class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">Parameter\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/th>\n            \u003cth class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">Data Type\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/th>\n            \u003cth class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">Mandatory\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/th>\n            \u003cth class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">Description\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/th>\n        \u003c/tr>\n    \u003c/thead>\n    \u003ctbody>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>merchantID\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">AN 25\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">M\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Unique merchant ID that is registered with 2C2P\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>invoiceNo\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">AN 50\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">M\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Unique merchant order number.\u003cbr />Example: 00000000010000091203\u003c/p>\n                \u003cbr />\n                \u003cp>\u003cstrong>Pass through invoice no restriction :\u003c/strong>\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    *Limited to length of 12 numerals when requesting for APM payment for\n                    Myanmar.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    *Limited to length of 20 alphanumeric when requesting for QR Payment.\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>idempotencyID\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">C 100\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Unique value generated by the merchant that is used to recognize\n                    subsequent retries of the same request.\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>description\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">C 250\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">M\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Product description. HTML Encode is required if it contains special\n                    characters.\n\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Avoid using unnecessary special characters, as they may cause issues with parsing or rendering on\n                    the\n                    receiving end.\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>amount\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">D (12,5)\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">M\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n              \u003cp>Example: 2500.90000\u003c/p>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\u003cp>Decimal point supported by each currency, refer to\n                    \u003ca href=\"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217\">ISO 4217\u003c/a>\n              \u003c/p>\n              \u003cp>For Currency \u003cb>IDR\u003c/b>, supported 0 decimal point \n   \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(which is different from ISO 4217)\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>currencyCode\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">A 3\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">M\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Transaction currency code in 3 alphabetical values as specified in ISO\n                    4217.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    If the value is empty, the system\u003cbr />will use the merchant's base\n                    currency\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>paymentChannel\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">Array AN 1-6\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    If this value is empty, all channels can be used.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Value must be in string array if multiple payment channels are\n                    requested.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Payment Token requests for 123 Channels, please refer to Group Code column instead.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Example : [\"CC\", \"IPP\", \"APM\", \"QR\"]\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Refer to\n                    \u003ca href=\"reference-payment-channels\">Payment Channel List.\u003c/a>\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>agentChannel\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">Array AN 1-6\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Value must be in string array.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Payment Token requests for 123 Channels, please refer to Agent Channel Code column instead.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Example : [\"WEBPAY\", \"ATM\", \"OVERTHECOUNTER\"]\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Refer to\n                    \u003ca href=\"reference-payment-channels\">Agent Channel Code\u003c/a>\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>request3DS\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">A1\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Specify enable/disable 3ds authentication\u003c/p>\n                \u003cul>\n                    \u003cli>Y &ndash; Enable 3ds (default)\u003c/li>\n                    \u003cli>F &ndash; Force 3ds\u003c/li>\n                    \u003cli>N &ndash; Disable 3ds\u003c/li>\n                \u003c/ul>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>tokenize\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">B\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Specify whether display store card checkbox is in payment page. Used\n                    to enable tokenization and card token will be returned when payment is\n                    approved.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Used by SDK UI\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>customerToken\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">Array\u003cbr />C 255\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    To register wallet tokens for payment. When a merchant requests to do\n                    Payment API later, only the registered wallet tokens are retrieved\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Value must be in string array if multiple wallet tokens are requested.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Example : [\"00001\", \"00002\"]\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">customerTokenOnly\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center\">B\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center\">O\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Specify whether to allow customer token only. This is only applicable for\n                    customer payment page.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    If merchant set to customer token only, new wallet options are not allowed\n                    in the payment page.\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>tokenizeOnly\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">B\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Specify whether to require tokenization with authorization\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    true - Tokenization without authorization\u003cbr />false - Tokenization\n                    with authorization (Default)\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Used by SDK UI\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>storeCredentials\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">A 1\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Store Credential (depend on acquiring bank whether support COF)\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    F &ndash; First time payment\u003cbr />S &ndash; Subsequent payment\u003cbr />N\n                    &ndash; Not using\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>externalToken\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">C Max\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>External token id used for specific payment channel\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Such as Alipay offline payment\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>interestType\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">A 1\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Installment interest type\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    A &ndash; All available options (Default)\u003cbr />C &ndash; Customer Pay\n                    Interest Option ONLY\u003cbr />M &ndash; Merchant Pay Interest Option ONLY\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n      \u003c/tr>\n\u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>externalToken\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">C Max\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>External token id used for specific payment channel\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Such as Alipay offline payment\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>installmentPeriodFilter\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">Array\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">N 2\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Select Installment Payment Plan Period that the merchant wants to\n                    offer.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Example:\u003cbr />Available periods are 3,6,12,24 months, but if the\n                    merchant wants to restrict to 3 &amp; 6 months only, enter the value\n                    as [3,6]\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Value must be in Integer\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>installmentBankFilter\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">Array\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">N 2\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Select Installment Banks that the merchant wants to\n                    offer.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Example:\u003cbr />Available banks are HSBC, Citibank, but if the\n                    merchant wants to restrict to Citibank only, enter the value\n                    as [\"Citibank\"]\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Value must be in String\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>productCode\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">AN 50\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Installment product code\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>recurring\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">B\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>true - enable recurring\u003cbr />false - disable recurring (Default)\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Recurring transaction will add 5 additional digit behind invoicePrefix\n                    as invoice number.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>mandatory if recurring is set to true\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>allowAccumulate\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">B\u003c/p>\n of failed Recurring transaction amounts\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>true - Allow\u003cbr />false - Do not allow\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>mandatory if recurring is set to true\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>maxAccumulateAmount\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n     \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Maximum recurring accumulated amount.\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    If the maximum accumulated amount is exceeded, recurring feature will\n                    be terminated.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>mandatory if recurring is set to true\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>recurringInterval\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">N 3\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">C\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Recurring interval in days, system will charge every x days\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Example:\u003cbr />set to 30 days, payment was made on 1 May 2020,\u003cbr />System\n                    will charge next cycle on 1 June 2020 and so on.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>mandatory if recurring is set to true\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n of recurring payment that the system will\n                    charge.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>mandatory if recurring is set to true\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Set this to '0' to charge indefinitely until terminated manually.\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>chargeNextDate\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">N 8\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>The next date of recurring payment\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>format: ddMMyyyy\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Only required if RPP with recurringInterval is set.\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    If RPP is using chargeOnDate then chargeNextDate is optional. If\n                    chargeNextDate is not set, chargeOnDate Date and Month will be used.\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>chargeOnDate\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">N 4\u003c/p>\n month that the recurring payment is\n                    charged.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>MM is only used if field chargeNextDate is not set.\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>If this value is set, recurringInterval will not be valid.\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>mandatory if recurring is set to true\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n different than the cardholder&rsquo;s\n                    billing address\u003cbr />&bull; 04 = &ldquo;Ship to Store&rdquo; / Pick-up\n                    at local store (Store address shall be populated in shipping address\n                    fields)\u003cbr />&bull; 05 = Digital goods (includes online services,\n                    electronic gift cards and redemption codes)\u003cbr />&bull; 06 = Travel\n                    and Event tickets, not shipped\u003cbr />&bull; 07 = Other (for example,\n                    gaming, digital services not shipped, emedia subscriptions, etc.)\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">&nbsp;\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\"            15 bits\u003cbr />&bull; 16 = 16 bits\u003cbr />&bull; 24 = 24 bits\u003cbr />&bull; 32\n                = 32 bits\u003cbr />&bull; 48 = 48 bits\n            \u003c/td>\n \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">&nbsp;\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"4\">Version\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center\">AN 255\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center\">O\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">Version of Browser\u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">clientIP\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center\">AN 45\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center\">O\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">Client IP Address\u003cbr>\u003cspan>If empty, extract from HTTP request header\u003c/span>\u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">clientAppID\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center\">AN 45\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center\">O\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">Client App ID\u003cbr>\u003cspan>Used in Mobile SDK\u003c/span>\u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">scaExemptionIndicator\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center\">C 255\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center\">O\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cbr />&bull;authentication_outage - when payer authentication is not\n                available \u003cbr />&bull; delegated_authentication - when the\n                authentication is performed another party \u003cbr />&bull; low_value - for\n                low value transaction \u003cbr />&bull; low_risk - for low risk transaction\n                \u003cbr />&bull; secure_corporate_payment - when payment is B2B transaction\n                \u003cbr />&bull; trusted_merchant - when the merchant is trusted by the\n                payer \u003cbr />&bull; recurring_payment - for recurring payment\n                \u003cbr />&bull; out_of_sca_scope - for MIT transaction\n                (transactionInitiator = 'M'), it is out of scope \u003cbr />&bull;\n                transaction_risk_assessment - for transactional risk analysis is already\n                performed \u003cbr />&bull; other - other reasons (if applicable)\n                \u003cbr />&bull; none - (default) sca exemption is not applied\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">previousPaymentID\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center\">C 255\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center\">O\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">Required if transactionInitiator = 'M'\u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">allow3DSUpgrade\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center\">A 1\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center\">O\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Only applicable for those using 2C2P's authentication and with the\n                    request of \"request3DS = Y\"\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    &bull; Y &ndash; allow upgrade to use 3DS if sca exemption didnt go\n                    through and soft decline happened\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>&bull; N - does not allow auto upgrade\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">requestReauthentication\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd re-authentication\u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">defaultSettlementCurrencyMerchantID\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\"
