callout_info\" theme=\"📘\">\u003cspan class=\"callout-icon\">📘\u003c/span>\u003ch3 class=\"heading heading-3 header-scroll\">\u003cdiv class=\"heading-anchor anchor waypoint\" id=\"data-attribute-reference\">\u003c/div>\u003cdiv class=\"heading-text\">Data Attribute Reference\u003c/div>\u003ca aria-label=\"Skip link to Data Attribute Reference\" class=\"heading-anchor-icon fa fa-regular fa-anchor\" href=\"#data-attribute-reference\">\u003c/a>\u003c/h3>\u003cp>\u003cstrong>Data Type\u003c/strong>\u003c/p>\u003cul>\n\u003cli>A: Alphabet\u003c/li>\n\u003cli>AN: Alphanumeric\u003c/li>\n\u003cli>NT: NText\u003c/li>\n\u003cli>C: Characters\u003c/li>\n\u003cli>B: Boolean\u003c/li>\n\u003cli>D: Decimal\u003c/li>\n\u003cli>N: Numeric\u003c/li>\n\u003c/ul>\u003cp>\u003cstrong>Mandatory attributes\u003c/strong>\u003c/p>\u003cul>\n\u003cli>M: Mandatory\u003c/li>\n\u003cli>C: Conditional\u003c/li>\n\u003cli>O: Optional\u003c/li>\n\u003c/ul>\u003c/blockquote>\u003c/div>\n\u003ch1 class=\"heading heading-1 header-scroll\">\u003cdiv class=\"heading-anchor anchor waypoint\" id=\"api-request-specification\">\u003c/div>\u003cdiv class=\"heading-text\">API Request Specification\u003c/div>\u003ca aria-label=\"Skip link to API Request Specification\" class=\"heading-anchor-icon fa fa-regular fa-anchor\" href=\"#api-request-specification\">\u003c/a>\u003c/h1>\n\u003cdiv class=\"readme-tailwind\">\u003cp>\u003cdiv class=\"rdmd-html\">\u003ctable class=\"relative-table wrapped\" style=\"width: 100%\">\n    \u003ccolgroup>\n        \u003ccol style=\"width: 4%\" />\n        \u003ccol style=\"width: 4%\" />\n        \u003ccol style=\"width: 4%\" />\n        \u003ccol style=\"width: 4%\" />\n        \u003ccol style=\"width: 4%\" />\n        \u003ccol style=\"width: 15%\" />\n        \u003ccol style=\"width: 5%\" />\n        \u003ccol style=\"width: 60%\" />\n    \u003c/colgroup>\n    \u003cthead>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003cth class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">Parameter\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/th>\n            \u003cth class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">Data Type\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/th>\n            \u003cth class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">Mandatory\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/th>\n            \u003cth class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">Description\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/th>\n        \u003c/tr>\n    \u003c/thead>\n    \u003ctbody>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>merchantID\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">AN 25\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">M\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Unique merchant ID that is registered with 2C2P\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>invoiceNo\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">AN 50\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">M\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Unique merchant order number.\u003cbr />Example: 00000000010000091203\u003c/p>\n                \u003cbr />\n                \u003cp>\u003cstrong>Pass through invoice no restriction :\u003c/strong>\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    *Limited to length of 12 numerals when requesting for APM payment for\n                    Myanmar.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    *Limited to length of 20 alphanumeric when requesting for QR Payment.\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>idempotencyID\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">C 100\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Unique value generated by the merchant that is used to recognize\n                    subsequent retries of the same request.\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>description\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">C 250\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">M\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Product description. HTML Encode is required if it contains special\n                    characters.\n\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Avoid using unnecessary special characters, as they may cause issues with parsing or rendering on\n                    the\n                    receiving end.\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>amount\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">D (12,5)\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">M\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n              \u003cp>Example: 2500.90000\u003c/p>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\u003cp>Decimal point supported by each currency, refer to\n                    \u003ca href=\"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217\">ISO 4217\u003c/a>\n              \u003c/p>\n              \u003cp>For Currency \u003cb>IDR\u003c/b>, supported 0 decimal point \n   \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(which is different from ISO 4217)\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>currencyCode\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">A 3\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">M\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Transaction currency code in 3 alphabetical values as specified in ISO\n                    4217.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    If the value is empty, the system\u003cbr />will use the merchant's base\n                    currency\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>paymentChannel\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">Array AN 1-6\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    If this value is empty, all channels can be used.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Value must be in string array if multiple payment channels are\n                    requested.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Payment Token requests for 123 Channels, please refer to Group Code column instead.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Example : [\"CC\", \"IPP\", \"APM\", \"QR\"]\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Refer to\n                    \u003ca href=\"reference-payment-channels\">Payment Channel List.\u003c/a>\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>agentChannel\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">Array AN 1-6\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Value must be in string array.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Payment Token requests for 123 Channels, please refer to Agent Channel Code column instead.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Example : [\"WEBPAY\", \"ATM\", \"OVERTHECOUNTER\"]\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Refer to\n                    \u003ca href=\"reference-payment-channels\">Agent Channel Code\u003c/a>\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>request3DS\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">A1\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Specify enable/disable 3ds authentication\u003c/p>\n                \u003cul>\n                    \u003cli>Y &ndash; Enable 3ds (default)\u003c/li>\n                    \u003cli>F &ndash; Force 3ds\u003c/li>\n                    \u003cli>N &ndash; Disable 3ds\u003c/li>\n                \u003c/ul>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>tokenize\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">B\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Specify whether display store card checkbox is in payment page. Used\n                    to enable tokenization and card token will be returned when payment is\n                    approved.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Used by SDK UI\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>customerToken\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">Array\u003cbr />C 255\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    To register wallet tokens for payment. When a merchant requests to do\n                    Payment API later, only the registered wallet tokens are retrieved\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Value must be in string array if multiple wallet tokens are requested.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Example : [\"00001\", \"00002\"]\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">customerTokenOnly\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center\">B\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center\">O\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Specify whether to allow customer token only. This is only applicable for\n                    customer payment page.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    If merchant set to customer token only, new wallet options are not allowed\n                    in the payment page.\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>tokenizeOnly\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">B\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Specify whether to require tokenization with authorization\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    true - Tokenization without authorization\u003cbr />false - Tokenization\n                    with authorization (Default)\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Used by SDK UI\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>storeCredentials\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">A 1\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Store Credential (depend on acquiring bank whether support COF)\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    F &ndash; First time payment\u003cbr />S &ndash; Subsequent payment\u003cbr />N\n                    &ndash; Not using\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>externalToken\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">C Max\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>External token id used for specific payment channel\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Such as Alipay offline payment\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>interestType\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">A 1\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Installment interest type\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    A &ndash; All available options (Default)\u003cbr />C &ndash; Customer Pay\n                    Interest Option ONLY\u003cbr />M &ndash; Merchant Pay Interest Option ONLY\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n      \u003c/tr>\n\u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>externalToken\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">C Max\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>External token id used for specific payment channel\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Such as Alipay offline payment\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>installmentPeriodFilter\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">Array\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">N 2\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Select Installment Payment Plan Period that the merchant wants to\n                    offer.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Example:\u003cbr />Available periods are 3,6,12,24 months, but if the\n                    merchant wants to restrict to 3 &amp; 6 months only, enter the value\n                    as [3,6]\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Value must be in Integer\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>installmentBankFilter\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">Array\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">N 2\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Select Installment Banks that the merchant wants to\n                    offer.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Example:\u003cbr />Available banks are HSBC, Citibank, but if the\n                    merchant wants to restrict to Citibank only, enter the value\n                    as [\"Citibank\"]\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Value must be in String\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>productCode\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">AN 50\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Installment product code\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>recurring\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">B\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>true - enable recurring\u003cbr />false - disable recurring (Default)\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>invoicePrefix\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">AN 15\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">C\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Recurring transaction will add 5 additional digit behind invoicePrefix\n                    as invoice number.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>mandatory if recurring is set to true\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>recurringAmount\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">D (12,5)\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Recurring charge amount. If this value is not set, system will use\n                    transaction amount\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>allowAccumulate\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">B\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">C\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Allow accumulation of failed Recurring transaction amounts\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>true - Allow\u003cbr />false - Do not allow\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>mandatory if recurring is set to true\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>maxAccumulateAmount\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">D (12,5)\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">C\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Maximum recurring accumulated amount.\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    If the maximum accumulated amount is exceeded, recurring feature will\n                    be terminated.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>mandatory if recurring is set to true\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>recurringInterval\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">N 3\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">C\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Recurring interval in days, system will charge every x days\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Example:\u003cbr />set to 30 days, payment was made on 1 May 2020,\u003cbr />System\n                    will charge next cycle on 1 June 2020 and so on.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>mandatory if recurring is set to true\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>recurringCount\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">N 5\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">C\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Specify the number of cycles of recurring payment that the system will\n                    charge.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>mandatory if recurring is set to true\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Set this to '0' to charge indefinitely until terminated manually.\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>chargeNextDate\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">N 8\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>The next date of recurring payment\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>format: ddMMyyyy\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Only required if RPP with recurringInterval is set.\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    If RPP is using chargeOnDate then chargeNextDate is optional. If\n                    chargeNextDate is not set, chargeOnDate Date and Month will be used.\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>chargeOnDate\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">N 4\u003c/p>\n Recurring payment charge on specific day of every month.\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Date format is ddMM.\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    dd represents which day of every month that the recurring payment is\n                    charged.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>MM is only used if field chargeNextDate is not set.\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>If this value is set, recurringInterval will not be valid.\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>mandatory if recurring is set to true\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n cardholder&rsquo;s billing address\u003cbr />&bull; 02\n                    = Ship to another verified address on file with merchant\u003cbr />&bull;\n                    03 = Ship to address that is different than the cardholder&rsquo;s\n                    billing address\u003cbr />&bull; 04 = &ldquo;Ship to Store&rdquo; / Pick-up\n                    at local store (Store address shall be populated in shipping address\n                    fields)\u003cbr />&bull; 05 = Digital goods (includes online services,\n                    electronic gift cards and redemption codes)\u003cbr />&bull; 06 = Travel\n                    and Event tickets, not shipped\u003cbr />&bull; 07 = Other (for example,\n                    gaming, digital services not shipped, emedia subscriptions, etc.)\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">&nbsp;\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\"           \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cbr />&bull;authentication_outage - when payer authentication is not\n                available \u003cbr />&bull; delegated_authentication - when the\n                authentication is performed another party \u003cbr />&bull; low_value - for\n                low value transaction \u003cbr />&bull; low_risk - for low risk transaction\n                \u003cbr />&bull; secure_corporate_payment - when payment is B2B transaction\n                \u003cbr />&bull; trusted_merchant - when the merchant is trusted by the\n                payer \u003cbr />&bull; recurring_payment - for recurring payment\n                \u003cbr />&bull; out_of_sca_scope - for MIT transaction\n                (transactionInitiator = 'M'), it is out of scope \u003cbr />&bull;\n                transaction_risk_assessment - for transactional risk analysis is already\n                performed \u003cbr />&bull; other - other reasons (if applicable)\n                \u003cbr />&bull; none - (default) sca exemption is not applied\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>amount\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">D (12,5)\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">M\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n              \u003cp>Example: 2500.90000\u003c/p>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\u003cp>Decimal point supported by each currency, refer to\n                    \u003ca href=\"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217\">ISO 4217\u003c/a>\n              \u003c/p>\n              \u003cp>For Currency \u003cb>IDR\u003c/b>, supported 0 decimal point \n   \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(which is different from ISO 4217)\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>currencyCode\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">A 3\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">M\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Transaction currency code in 3 alphabetical values as specified in ISO\n                    4217.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    If the value is empty, the system\u003cbr />will use the merchant's base\n                    currency\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>paymentChannel\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">Array AN 1-6\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    If this value is empty, all channels can be used.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Value must be in string array if multiple payment channels are\n                    requested.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Payment Token requests for 123 Channels, please refer to Group Code column instead.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Example : [\"CC\", \"IPP\", \"APM\", \"QR\"]\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Refer to\n                    \u003ca href=\"reference-payment-channels\">Payment Channel List.\u003c/a>\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>agentChannel\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">Array AN 1-6\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Value must be in string array.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Payment Token requests for 123 Channels, please refer to Agent Channel Code column instead.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Example : [\"WEBPAY\", \"ATM\", \"OVERTHECOUNTER\"]\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Refer to\n                    \u003ca href=\"reference-payment-channels\">Agent Channel Code\u003c/a>\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>request3DS\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">A1\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Specify enable/disable 3ds authentication\u003c/p>\n                \u003cul>\n                    \u003cli>Y &ndash; Enable 3ds (default)\u003c/li>\n                    \u003cli>F &ndash; Force 3ds\u003c/li>\n                    \u003cli>N &ndash; Disable 3ds\u003c/li>\n                \u003c/ul>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>tokenize\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">B\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Specify whether display store card checkbox is in payment page. Used\n                    to enable tokenization and card token will be returned when payment is\n                    approved.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Used by SDK UI\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>customerToken\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">Array\u003cbr />C 255\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    To register wallet tokens for payment. When a merchant requests to do\n                    Payment API later, only the registered wallet tokens are retrieved\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Value must be in string array if multiple wallet tokens are requested.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Example : [\"00001\", \"00002\"]\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">customerTokenOnly\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center\">B\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center\">O\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Specify whether to allow customer token only. This is only applicable for\n                    customer payment page.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    If merchant set to customer token only, new wallet options are not allowed\n                    in the payment page.\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>tokenizeOnly\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">B\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Specify whether to require tokenization with authorization\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    true - Tokenization without authorization\u003cbr />false - Tokenization\n                    with authorization (Default)\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Used by SDK UI\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>storeCredentials\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">A 1\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Store Credential (depend on acquiring bank whether support COF)\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    F &ndash; First time payment\u003cbr />S &ndash; Subsequent payment\u003cbr />N\n                    &ndash; Not using\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>externalToken\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">C Max\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>External token id used for specific payment channel\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Such as Alipay offline payment\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>interestType\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">A 1\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Installment interest type\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    A &ndash; All available options (Default)\u003cbr />C &ndash; Customer Pay\n                    Interest Option ONLY\u003cbr />M &ndash; Merchant Pay Interest Option ONLY\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n      \u003c/tr>\n\u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>externalToken\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">C Max\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>External token id used for specific payment channel\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Such as Alipay offline payment\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>installmentPeriodFilter\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">Array\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">N 2\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Select Installment Payment Plan Period that the merchant wants to\n                    offer.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Example:\u003cbr />Available periods are 3,6,12,24 months, but if the\n                    merchant wants to restrict to 3 &amp; 6 months only, enter the value\n                    as [3,6]\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Value must be in Integer\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>installmentBankFilter\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">Array\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">N 2\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Select Installment Banks that the merchant wants to\n                    offer.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Example:\u003cbr />Available banks are HSBC, Citibank, but if the\n                    merchant wants to restrict to Citibank only, enter the value\n                    as [\"Citibank\"]\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Value must be in String\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>productCode\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">AN 50\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Installment product code\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>recurring\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">B\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>true - enable recurring\u003cbr />false - disable recurring (Default)\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>invoicePrefix\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">AN 15\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">C\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Recurring transaction will add 5 additional digit behind invoicePrefix\n                    as invoice number.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>mandatory if recurring is set to true\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>recurringAmount\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">D (12,5)\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Recurring charge amount. If this value is not set, system will use\n                    transaction amount\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>allowAccumulate\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">B\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">C\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Allow accumulation of failed Recurring transaction amounts\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>true - Allow\u003cbr />false - Do not allow\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>mandatory if recurring is set to true\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>maxAccumulateAmount\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">D (12,5)\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">C\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Maximum recurring accumulated amount.\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    If the maximum accumulated amount is exceeded, recurring feature will\n                    be terminated.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>mandatory if recurring is set to true\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>recurringInterval\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">N 3\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">C\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Recurring interval in days, system will charge every x days\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Example:\u003cbr />set to 30 days, payment was made on 1 May 2020,\u003cbr />System\n                    will charge next cycle on 1 June 2020 and so on.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>mandatory if recurring is set to true\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>recurringCount\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">N 5\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">C\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Specify the number of cycles of recurring payment that the system will\n                    charge.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>mandatory if recurring is set to true\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Set this to '0' to charge indefinitely until terminated manually.\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>chargeNextDate\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">N 8\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>The next date of recurring payment\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>format: ddMMyyyy\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Only required if RPP with recurringInterval is set.\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    If RPP is using chargeOnDate then chargeNextDate is optional. If\n                    chargeNextDate is not set, chargeOnDate Date and Month will be used.\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>chargeOnDate\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">N 4\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">C\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Indicate Recurring payment charge on specific day of every month.\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Date format is ddMM.\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    dd represents which day of every month that the recurring payment is\n                    charged.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>MM is only used if field chargeNextDate is not set.\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>If this value is set, recurringInterval will not be valid.\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>mandatory if recurring is set to true\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>paymentExpiry\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">C 19\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Duration of time which the customer is allowed to complete payment.\n                    Payment completed after the expiry date/time will be rejected.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Date Format : yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Default value is 20 minutes\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>promotionCode\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">AN 20\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Promotion code for the payment.\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>&nbsp;\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>paymentRouteID\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">C 255\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Payment routing rules based on custom configuration\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>fxProviderCode\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">AN 20\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Forex provided code used to enable multiple currency payments\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>fxRateId\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">C 50\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Forex rate id\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Refer to \u003ca href=\"api-exchange-rate\">Exchange Rate API\u003c/a>.\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>originalAmount\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">D 12,5\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>original currency amount\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>immediatePayment\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">B\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>To trigger payment immediately\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>iframeMode\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">B\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n cardholder&rsquo;s billing address\u003cbr />&bull; 02\n                    = Ship to another verified address on file with merchant\u003cbr />&bull;\n                    03 = Ship to address that is different than the cardholder&rsquo;s\n                    billing address\u003cbr />&bull; 04 = &ldquo;Ship to Store&rdquo; / Pick-up\n                    at local store (Store address shall be populated in shipping address\n                    fields)\u003cbr />&bull; 05 = Digital goods (includes online services,\n                    electronic gift cards and redemption codes)\u003cbr />&bull; 06 = Travel\n                    and Event tickets, not shipped\u003cbr />&bull; 07 = Other (for example,\n                    gaming, digital services not shipped, emedia subscriptions, etc.)\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">&nbsp;\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" \u003ctd class=\"\">Browser Info, if not available submit null object\u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">&nbsp;\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">&nbsp;\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"3\">&nbsp;browserAcceptHeader\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center\">C 2048\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center\">M\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                Exact content of the&nbsp;HTTP accept headers from\n                the&nbsp;Cardholder&rsquo;s browser\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">&nbsp;\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">&nbsp;\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"3\">&nbsp;browserIP\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center\">C 45\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center\">M\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                IP address of the&nbsp;browser as returned by&nbsp;the HTTP headers\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">&nbsp;\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">&nbsp;\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"3\">&nbsp;browserJavaEnabled\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center\">B\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center\">M\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                Boolean that represents&nbsp;the ability of the&nbsp;cardholder browser\n                to&nbsp;execute Java.\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">&nbsp;\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">&nbsp;\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"3\">&nbsp;browserLanguage\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center\">C 8\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center\">M\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                Value representing the&nbsp;browser language as&nbsp;defined in IETF\n                BCP47\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">&nbsp;\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">&nbsp;\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"3\">&nbsp;browserColorDepth\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center\">C 2\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center\">M\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                Value representing the&nbsp;bit depth of the colour&nbsp;palette for\n                displaying&nbsp;images, in bits per pixel.\u003cbr />Values accepted:\u003cbr />&bull;\n                1 = 1 bit\u003cbr />&bull; 4 = 4 bits\u003cbr />&bull; 8 = 8 bits\u003cbr />&bull; 15 =\n                15 bits\u003cbr />&bull; 16 = 16 bits\u003cbr />&bull; 24 = 24 bits\u003cbr />&bull; 32\n                = 32 bits\u003cbr />&bull; 48 = 48 bits\n            \u003c/td>\n           \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cbr />&bull;authentication_outage - when payer authentication is not\n                available \u003cbr />&bull; delegated_authentication - when the\n                authentication is performed another party \u003cbr />&bull; low_value - for\n                low value transaction \u003cbr />&bull; low_risk - for low risk transaction\n                \u003cbr />&bull; secure_corporate_payment - when payment is B2B transaction\n                \u003cbr />&bull; trusted_merchant - when the merchant is trusted by the\n                payer \u003cbr />&bull; recurring_payment - for recurring payment\n                \u003cbr />&bull; out_of_sca_scope - for MIT transaction\n                (transactionInitiator = 'M'), it is out of scope \u003cbr />&bull;\n                transaction_risk_assessment - for transactional risk analysis is already\n                performed \u003cbr />&bull; other - other reasons (if applicable)\n                \u003cbr />&bull; none - (default) sca exemption is not applied\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" href=\"reference-codes-account-funding-account-identifier-type\">Account Funding Account\n                        Identifier Type\u003c/a>\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center;\">&nbsp;AN 34\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center;\">&nbsp;O\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">&nbsp;\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"3\">accountFundingMethod\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center;\">Enum&nbsp;\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center;\">&nbsp;O\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">&nbsp;If the recipient&nbsp;accountIdentifierType&nbsp;is&nbsp;CARDNO, the&nbsp;funding method\n                of the card is required.&nbsp;\u003cul>\n                    \u003cli>DEBIT\u003c/li>\n                    \u003cli>CREDIT\u003c/li>\n                    \u003cli>CHARGE\u003c/li>\n                    \u003cli>UNKNOWN\u003c/li>\n                \u003c/ul>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">&nbsp;\u003c/td>\n       \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center;\">&nbsp;AN 50\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center;\">&nbsp;O\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd     \u003ctd class=\"\">&nbsp;\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"2\">address2\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center;\">&nbsp;AN 50\u003c/td>\n 📘 Data Attribute Reference\n>\n> **Data Type**\n>\n> * A: Alphabet\n> * AN: Alphanumeric\n> * NT: NText\n> * C: Characters\n> * B: Boolean\n> * D: Decimal\n> * N: Numeric\n>\n> **Mandatory attributes**\n>\n> * M: Mandatory\n> * C: Conditional\n> * O: Optional","PaymentTokenRequestParameterTable":"\u003cHTMLBlock>{`\n\u003ctable class=\"relative-table wrapped\" style=\"width: 100%\">\n    \u003ccolgroup>\n        \u003ccol style=\"width: 4%\" />\n        \u003ccol style=\"width: 4%\" />\n        \u003ccol style=\"width: 4%\" />\n        \u003ccol style=\"width: 4%\" />\n        \u003ccol style=\"width: 4%\" />\n        \u003ccol style=\"width: 15%\" />\n        \u003ccol style=\"width: 5%\" />\n        \u003ccol style=\"width: 60%\" />\n    \u003c/colgroup>\n    \u003cthead>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003cth class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">Parameter\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/th>\n            \u003cth class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">Data Type\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/th>\n            \u003cth class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">Mandatory\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/th>\n            \u003cth class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">Description\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/th>\n        \u003c/tr>\n    \u003c/thead>\n    \u003ctbody>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>merchantID\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">AN 25\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">M\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Unique merchant ID that is registered with 2C2P\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>invoiceNo\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">AN 50\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">M\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Unique merchant order number.\u003cbr />Example: 00000000010000091203\u003c/p>\n                \u003cbr />\n                \u003cp>\u003cstrong>Pass through invoice no restriction :\u003c/strong>\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    *Limited to length of 12 numerals when requesting for APM payment for\n                    Myanmar.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    *Limited to length of 20 alphanumeric when requesting for QR Payment.\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>idempotencyID\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">C 100\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Unique value generated by the merchant that is used to recognize\n                    subsequent retries of the same request.\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>description\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">C 250\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">M\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Product description. HTML Encode is required if it contains special\n                    characters.\n\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Avoid using unnecessary special characters, as they may cause issues with parsing or rendering on\n                    the\n                    receiving end.\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>amount\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">D (12,5)\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">M\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n              \u003cp>Example: 2500.90000\u003c/p>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\u003cp>Decimal point supported by each currency, refer to\n                    \u003ca href=\"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217\">ISO 4217\u003c/a>\n              \u003c/p>\n              \u003cp>For Currency \u003cb>IDR\u003c/b>, supported 0 decimal point \n   \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(which is different from ISO 4217)\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>currencyCode\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">A 3\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">M\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Transaction currency code in 3 alphabetical values as specified in ISO\n                    4217.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    If the value is empty, the system\u003cbr />will use the merchant's base\n                    currency\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>paymentChannel\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">Array AN 1-6\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    If this value is empty, all channels can be used.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Value must be in string array if multiple payment channels are\n                    requested.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Payment Token requests for 123 Channels, please refer to Group Code column instead.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Example : [\"CC\", \"IPP\", \"APM\", \"QR\"]\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Refer to\n                    \u003ca href=\"reference-payment-channels\">Payment Channel List.\u003c/a>\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>agentChannel\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">Array AN 1-6\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Value must be in string array.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Payment Token requests for 123 Channels, please refer to Agent Channel Code column instead.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Example : [\"WEBPAY\", \"ATM\", \"OVERTHECOUNTER\"]\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Refer to\n                    \u003ca href=\"reference-payment-channels\">Agent Channel Code\u003c/a>\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>request3DS\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">A1\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Specify enable/disable 3ds authentication\u003c/p>\n                \u003cul>\n                    \u003cli>Y &ndash; Enable 3ds (default)\u003c/li>\n                    \u003cli>F &ndash; Force 3ds\u003c/li>\n                    \u003cli>N &ndash; Disable 3ds\u003c/li>\n                \u003c/ul>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>tokenize\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">B\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Specify whether display store card checkbox is in payment page. Used\n                    to enable tokenization and card token will be returned when payment is\n                    approved.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Used by SDK UI\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>customerToken\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">Array\u003cbr />C 255\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    To register wallet tokens for payment. When a merchant requests to do\n                    Payment API later, only the registered wallet tokens are retrieved\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Value must be in string array if multiple wallet tokens are requested.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Example : [\"00001\", \"00002\"]\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">customerTokenOnly\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center\">B\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" style=\"text-align: center\">O\u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Specify whether to allow customer token only. This is only applicable for\n                    customer payment page.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    If merchant set to customer token only, new wallet options are not allowed\n                    in the payment page.\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>tokenizeOnly\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">B\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Specify whether to require tokenization with authorization\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    true - Tokenization without authorization\u003cbr />false - Tokenization\n                    with authorization (Default)\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Used by SDK UI\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>storeCredentials\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">A 1\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Store Credential (depend on acquiring bank whether support COF)\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    F &ndash; First time payment\u003cbr />S &ndash; Subsequent payment\u003cbr />N\n                    &ndash; Not using\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>externalToken\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">C Max\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>External token id used for specific payment channel\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Such as Alipay offline payment\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>interestType\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">A 1\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Installment interest type\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    A &ndash; All available options (Default)\u003cbr />C &ndash; Customer Pay\n                    Interest Option ONLY\u003cbr />M &ndash; Merchant Pay Interest Option ONLY\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n      \u003c/tr>\n\u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>externalToken\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">C Max\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>External token id used for specific payment channel\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Such as Alipay offline payment\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>installmentPeriodFilter\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">Array\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">N 2\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Select Installment Payment Plan Period that the merchant wants to\n                    offer.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Example:\u003cbr />Available periods are 3,6,12,24 months, but if the\n                    merchant wants to restrict to 3 &amp; 6 months only, enter the value\n                    as [3,6]\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Value must be in Integer\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>installmentBankFilter\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">Array\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">N 2\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>\n                    Select Installment Banks that the merchant wants to\n                    offer.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Example:\u003cbr />Available banks are HSBC, Citibank, but if the\n                    merchant wants to restrict to Citibank only, enter the value\n                    as [\"Citibank\"]\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Value must be in String\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>productCode\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">AN 50\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Installment product code\u003c/p>\n              \u003cp>mandatory if recurring is set to true\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>allowAccumulate\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">B\u003c/p>\n of failed Recurring transaction amounts\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>true - Allow\u003cbr />false - Do not allow\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>mandatory if recurring is set to true\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>maxAccumulateAmount\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n     \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Maximum recurring accumulated amount.\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    If the maximum accumulated amount is exceeded, recurring feature will\n                    be terminated.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>mandatory if recurring is set to true\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>recurringInterval\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">N 3\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">C\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>Recurring interval in days, system will charge every x days\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    Example:\u003cbr />set to 30 days, payment was made on 1 May 2020,\u003cbr />System\n                    will charge next cycle on 1 June 2020 and so on.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>mandatory if recurring is set to true\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n of recurring payment that the system will\n                    charge.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>mandatory if recurring is set to true\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Set this to '0' to charge indefinitely until terminated manually.\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>chargeNextDate\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">N 8\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">O\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp>The next date of recurring payment\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>format: ddMMyyyy\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>Only required if RPP with recurringInterval is set.\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>\n                    If RPP is using chargeOnDate then chargeNextDate is optional. If\n                    chargeNextDate is not set, chargeOnDate Date and Month will be used.\n                \u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n        \u003ctr>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\" colspan=\"5\">\n                \u003cp>chargeOnDate\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n            \u003ctd class=\"\">\n                \u003cp align=\"center\">N 4\u003c/p>\n month that the recurring payment is\n                    charged.\n                \u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>MM is only used if field chargeNextDate is not set.\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>If this value is set, recurringInterval will not be valid.\u003c/p>\n                \u003cp>mandatory if recurring is set to true\u003c/p>\n            \u003c/td>\n        \u003c/tr>\n
